userStories.title: Project Scaffolding
userStories.description: Set up a monorepo with frontend (React + Vite + TypeScript) and backend (Node.js + Express + ws) packages. Include TypeScript strict mode, ESLint, and concurrent dev scripts.
acceptanceCriteria: Monorepo structure with packages/frontend and packages/backend
Vite + React + TypeScript dev server runs on port 5173
Node.js + Express server runs on port 3001
TypeScript strict mode enabled
npm run dev starts both frontend and backend concurrently
ESLint configured with basic rules
Root package.json with workspace configuration

userStories.title: Canvas with Basic Drawing Tools
userStories.description: Implement a full-screen canvas with a left toolbar offering Select, Rectangle, Ellipse, and Freehand (Pencil) tools. Shapes render with hand-drawn aesthetic via rough.js.
acceptanceCriteria: Full-screen canvas area with white background
Toolbar on the left side with tool buttons: Select, Rectangle, Ellipse, Freehand
Click and drag to draw rectangles and ellipses
Freehand drawing follows mouse/pen movement
Shapes render with hand-drawn aesthetic (rough.js)
Selected tool is visually highlighted in toolbar
Drawing works smoothly at 60fps

userStories.title: Shape Selection and Manipulation
userStories.description: Allow users to select shapes, move them, resize via handles, and delete them. Include basic undo support.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a shape selects it (shows bounding box with resize handles)
Dragging a selected shape moves it
Dragging resize handles resizes the shape
Pressing Delete/Backspace removes the selected shape
Clicking empty canvas deselects
Undo (Ctrl+Z) works for the last action

userStories.title: Shape Styling
userStories.description: Add a properties bar for changing stroke color, fill color, stroke width, stroke style, and fill style of selected shapes.
acceptanceCriteria: Properties panel shows styling options when a shape is selected
Color picker with 8+ preset colors and custom color support
Stroke width selector: thin (1px), medium (2px), thick (4px)
Fill toggle: none, solid, hatch
Stroke style: solid, dashed
Changes apply immediately to selected shape
Defaults: black stroke, 2px width, no fill

userStories.title: Text Tool
userStories.description: Add a text tool that lets users place editable text on the canvas, which can be moved and styled like other shapes.
acceptanceCriteria: Text tool in toolbar
Clicking canvas creates editable text field
Enter or clicking away finishes editing
Text can be selected, moved, and resized
Default font: system sans-serif, 20px
Text content stored in shape data model

userStories.title: Room-Based Collaboration
userStories.description: Implement room creation and joining via unique URL. Display room ID, share button, and user count.
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting / generates unique room ID and redirects to /room/:roomId
Visiting /room/:roomId joins that room
Room ID is short, readable string (e.g., a3f7k2)
Share button copies room URL to clipboard
Current user count displayed
Room cleaned up 5 minutes after last user leaves

userStories.title: Real-Time Shape Sync
userStories.description: Broadcast shape create/update/delete events to all users in the room via WebSocket. Handle disconnect/reconnect gracefully.
acceptanceCriteria: Shape changes appear on all users' canvases within 200ms
WebSocket connects on room join, sends full canvas state
Delta updates broadcast per mutation
Concurrent edits merged without conflicts (last-write-wins acceptable)
Disconnect shows Reconnecting banner; reconnect re-syncs full state
Shapes from other users attributed with colored border

userStories.title: Live Cursor Presence
userStories.description: Show other users' cursors with colored pointers and random names, updated in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: Each user assigned random color and random name (e.g., Purple Fox)
Other users' cursors rendered as colored pointers with name labels
Cursor position throttled to 30fps via WebSocket
Cursor disappears when user leaves
Drawing users show pencil indicator on cursor
Cursor names render on top layer, never overlapping shapes

userStories.title: Canvas Pan and Zoom
userStories.description: Add mouse wheel zoom, middle-click/space+drag pan, zoom level indicator, and double-click reset.
acceptanceCriteria: Mouse wheel zooms in/out centered on cursor
Middle-click drag or space+drag pans the canvas
Zoom range: 10% to 500%
Zoom level indicator in bottom-right corner
Double-click on empty canvas resets zoom to 100%
All shapes render correctly at all zoom levels
Pan/zoom state is per-user (not shared)
